items.configValue: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","description":"A schema for pricing data, including price list name and price entries.","properties":{"priceEntries":{"description":"An array of price entries for different SKUs.","items":{"properties":{"cost":{"description":"The cost of the product.","minimum":0,"type":"number"},"discount":{"description":"An optional discount percentage.","maximum":100,"minimum":0,"type":"number"},"price":{"description":"The base price of the product.","minimum":0,"type":"number"},"sku":{"description":"The SKU of the product.","type":"string"},"tierPrices":{"description":"An array of tier prices for bulk purchasing.","items":{"properties":{"minQuantity":{"description":"The minimum quantity for this tier.","minimum":1,"type":"integer"},"price":{"description":"The price for this tier.","minimum":0,"type":"number"}},"required":["minQuantity","price"],"type":"object"},"type":"array"}},"required":["sku","price"],"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"priceListName":{"description":"The name of the price list.","type":"string"}},"required":["priceListName","priceEntries"],"title":"Pricing","type":"object"}
